curveRmetrics 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Computing Standard Curve Quality Control Metrics using curveRmetrics

Vectorised curve evaluation with per-point error guard

Source: R/second_derivative.R
dot-sderiv_eval_vec.Rd

Attempts to evaluate p$eval_fn (or .evaluate_curve as a fallback) over the entire vector x_vec in a single call. If that call throws an error, each point is evaluated individually and failures are replaced with NA.

Usage

.sderiv_eval_vec(p, x_vec)

Arguments

p

A named list of curve parameters. If p$eval_fn is a function it is used as the evaluator; otherwise .evaluate_curve is called with p and x.

x_vec

Numeric vector of concentration values to evaluate.

Value

Numeric vector of the same length as x_vec with NA substituted for any evaluation failure.

On this page
